description: Zingiber officinale tea contains bioactive constituents such as gingerols and shogaols, which have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties that help to alleviate period cramp pain. The warming and relaxing properties of this herbal tea help to soothe the uterine muscles and reduce menstrual cramp discomfort.
